meta.title: Abdullah | Academic Portfolio
meta.description: Abdullah - Postdoctoral Research Fellow at Brigham and Women's Hospital / Harvard Medical School

bio: I am a Postdoctoral Research Fellow at Brigham and Women's Hospital and Harvard Medical School under Prof. Mahdi Moqri. I completed an earlier postdoctoral appointment in the Department of Bioengineering at Northeastern University under Prof. Lee Makowski, developing statistical signal processing and machine learning methods for structural characterization of pathological inclusions in Alzheimer's disease. I received my Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering from Northeastern in December 2024, also under Prof. Makowski, and my M.Sc. in Engineering from Texas State University in 2019 under Prof. Damian Valles and Prof. Michael Forstner.

I have authored and co-authored peer-reviewed articles in journals including the Journal of Applied Crystallography (IUCr), Frontiers in Neuroscience, Robotics, and Applied Sciences, with conference publications in IEEE ISMCR, IEMCON, and CSCI. I have received the Margaret C. Etter Student Lecturer Award from the American Crystallographic Association (2021, 2023), the Ph.D. Network Travel Grant from Northeastern University (2022–2024), and multiple awards from Texas State University including the Ingram School of Engineering Director's List Award and Graduate College Scholarship.

affiliations.institution: Brigham and Women's Hospital / Harvard Medical School

news.content: Served as Oral Presentation Judge (Oral & RapidFire) at the Bioengineering Ph.D. Research Symposium, Northeastern University, Boston, MA.
Served as Poster Judge at the COE Ph.D. Research Expo, Northeastern University, Boston, MA.
Led a Technical Skills Series workshop on Applied Machine Learning for Biomedical Data at Northeastern Bioengineering.
Delivered a guest lecture on machine learning for drug discovery in BIOE 5410: Molecular Bioengineering at Northeastern University.
Led a Technical Skills Series workshop on Python for Data Analysis & Automation at Northeastern Bioengineering.
Started ancillary multi-omics study on the COPDGene cohort with Mathew Moll (BWH) and Surya Bhatt (UAB).
Submitted Paper to a IEEE Journal.
Attended Broad Institute Machine Learning in Drug Discovery symposium at Cambridge, MA.
Invited talk at BWH Systems Pharmacology Working Groups (Virtual).
Attended CDNM Systems Pharmacology Symposium at BWH, Boston, MA.
Ph.D. Thesis defended!
Paper accepted at Journal of Applied Crystallography.
Oral presentation at the 74th ACA Annual Meeting in Denver, Colorado.
Oral presentation at the 68th Biophysical Society Annual Meeting in Philadelphia, PA.
Oral presentation and awarded Etter Student Award at the 73rd ACA Annual Meeting in Baltimore, Maryland.
Invited talk at Brookhaven National Laboratory (BNL).
Paper accepted at Journal of Applied Crystallography.
Paper accepted at Robotics.
Paper accepted at Frontiers in Neuroscience.
Oral presentation at the 66th Biophysical Society Annual Meeting in San Francisco, CA.
Oral presentation and awarded Etter Student Award at the 71st ACA Annual Meeting (Virtual).
Paper accepted at Applied Sciences.
